# CountryCriteria

**Object**

The defined targeted audience by country or region.

## Declaration

```swift
object CountryCriteria
```

## Discussion

Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Search-for-Geolocations] with `entity` to search for and retrieve geolocations. Then use geotargeting dimensions `country`, `adminArea`, and `locality` in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/TargetingDimensions] payload with [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad-Group]  and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-an-Ad-Group] endpoints. For the country dimension, use two-letter country codes in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format. Campaigns that serve multiple countries or regions can’t use geotargeting. Use [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/UpdateCampaignRequest] to clear geotargeting from a campaign.

## Audience Refinement

- **TargetingDimensions**: The optional criteria to use with ad groups to narrow the audience that views your ads.
- **AppCategoryCriteria**: The defined target audience by app category.
- **AppDownloaderCriteria**: The defined targeted audience according to app downloads.
- **AdminAreaCriteria**: The defined targeted audience by administrative area.
- **LocalityCriteria**: The defined targeted audience by locality.
- **AgeCriteria**: The defined targeted audience to include using the age demographic.
- **AgeRange**: The defined target audience to include using the age-range demographic.
- **DaypartCriteria**: The defined targeted audience to include for a specific time of day.
- **DaypartDetail**: The defined targeted audience to include by a specific time of day.
- **DeviceClassCriteria**: The defined targeted audience to include by device type.
- **GenderCriteria**: The defined targeted audience to include using the gender demographic.
